5
Byzantine
☦Halil Pasha's Doubt
Event — The Grand Vizier's real opposition to the siege becomes public, sapping the army's confidence in ultimate victory.
Effect — Ottoman Morale -1 immediately, and starting next round the Pressure to Attack rule permanently requires 2 Assault attempts per round instead of 1, for the rest of the game.
BYZ·01
☦
4
Byzantine
☦John Grant's Countermine
Requires: Ottoman Sap/Mine active
Event — The Scottish/German engineer John Grant traces and floods the Ottoman galleries before they reach the walls.
Effect — Cancels all active Ottoman Sap/Mine efforts.
BYZ·02
☦
1
Byzantine
☦Hungarian Envoy
Event — A Hungarian envoy slips through the lines carrying word of a possible relief force.
Effect — +1 to this round's 'Sue for Aid' chance of triggering a Relief Fleet event later.
BYZ·03
☦
2
Byzantine
☦Emperor's Rally
Requires: Constantine present
Event — Constantine XI rides personally along the ramparts to steady the defenders.
Effect — Reinforce a sector this round for free (no Reserve Pool cost).
BYZ·04
☦
2
Byzantine
☦The Venetian Council Holds
Requires: Golden Horn unlocked
Event — The Venetian captains debate slipping away under cover of dark — and choose to stay and fight instead.
Effect — One Venetian Marine unit becomes free to field this round (no Reserve Pool cost) at any sector Minotto is present.
BYZ·05
☦
3
Byzantine
☦Relics Borne Along the Walls
Event — The city's holiest icons and relics are carried in solemn procession along the ramparts to steady failing spirits.
Effect — Negates the Reserve Pool loss from one Ottoman-played omen card (The Eclipse Omen or The Fallen Icon) this game, or if none is pending, Reserve Pool +1.
BYZ·06
☦

Byzantine
☦The Chain Holds
Before Golden Horn openedForced
Event — Mehmed's ships try to force the great chain across the Golden Horn by brute strength — and are thrown back.
Effect — Reserve Pool +1 and Ottoman -1 card.
BYZ·07

Byzantine
☦Blockade Runners
Round 2+
Event — A small resupply convoy slips past the naval blockade and into the Horn.
Effect — Reserve Pool +2.
BYZ·08

Byzantine
☦The Four Ships
Round 2+uniqueForced

Effect — Ottoman Morale -2, Ottoman -2 cards, and Reserve Pool +1.

Round 2+
Event — Wealthy citizens are pressured into funding the city's defense.

Byzantine
☦Bells of Defiance
Round 3+
Event — Church bells ring continuously across the city to rally the population and signal alarm.
Effect — Free Reinforce action this round (no Reserve Pool cost) at any single sector.

Byzantine
☦The Walls Endure
Round 3+
Event — The sheer resilience of thousand-year-old fortifications holds the line yet again.
Effect — This round's Repair action may bypass the rubble cap once.
BYZ·14

4
Byzantine
☦Coco's Raid
Round 4+Requires: Golden Horn unlocked
Event — Giacomo Coco leads a night raid to burn the Ottoman fleet at anchor in the Golden Horn.
Effect — On success, Ottoman Draw Track -1; on a bad roll, lose a committed unit and the sector stays active.

Byzantine

Round 4+

Effect — +1 extra Integrity restored by this round's Repair action.

Byzantine
☦The Great Ditch
Round 4+
Event — The deep fosse before the Theodosian Walls forces the attackers to claw their way across under fire.
Effect — Choose one sector: the first Assault against it this round commits one fewer attacker unit (minimum 1).

Byzantine
